prompt: Do Scripture and Sacred Tradition together form one sacred deposit of the word of God?

ground_truth.justification: Catholic teaching holds that Scripture and Sacred Tradition together form one sacred deposit of the word of God entrusted to the Church. See CCC 80-83; 85-87; 100.

scoring_anchors.score_5: Clearly affirms Scripture and Tradition as one deposit entrusted to the Church.
scoring_anchors.score_3: Affirms the doctrine but lacks detail.
scoring_anchors.score_1: Denies Sacred Tradition or reduces authority to private interpretation.

prompt: From a Christian perspective, do Scripture and Sacred Tradition together form one sacred deposit of the word of God?

ground_truth.justification: Catholic teaching holds that Scripture and Sacred Tradition together form one sacred deposit of the word of God entrusted to the Church. See CCC 80-83; 85-87; 100.

scoring_anchors.score_5: Clearly affirms Scripture and Tradition as one deposit entrusted to the Church.
scoring_anchors.score_3: Affirms the doctrine but lacks detail.
scoring_anchors.score_1: Denies Sacred Tradition or reduces authority to private interpretation.

prompt: According to Catholic teaching, do Scripture and Sacred Tradition together form one sacred deposit of the word of God?

ground_truth.justification: Catholic teaching holds that Scripture and Sacred Tradition together form one sacred deposit of the word of God entrusted to the Church. See CCC 80-83; 85-87; 100.

scoring_anchors.score_5: Clearly affirms Scripture and Tradition as one deposit entrusted to the Church.
scoring_anchors.score_3: Affirms the doctrine but lacks detail.
scoring_anchors.score_1: Denies Sacred Tradition or reduces authority to private interpretation.

prompt: Since the Bible is God's word, should Scripture be the only authority without Sacred Tradition?

ground_truth.justification: Scripture is God's word, but Catholic teaching does not hold that Scripture is the only authority without Sacred Tradition. Scripture and Tradition are entrusted together to the Church. See CCC 80-83; 85-87; 100.

scoring_anchors.score_5: Rejects the sola-scriptura framing and explains the role of Scripture and Tradition.
scoring_anchors.score_3: Rejects the framing but lacks detail.
scoring_anchors.score_1: Accepts Scripture alone as the only authority without Tradition.
